name: Tvp® Gyros
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup tomato paste (I remembered it this time!!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Form into balls or patties.
3. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes, or cook in a nonstick skillet until heated through.
Note: This recipe is high in sodium due to the bean flakes and chutney. The coriander chutney can be found in Asian grocery stores. It does not contain oil.
